allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Implement MVP: Supabase backend, audio recording, transcription, TipTap editor, AI assistant

Transform the UI prototype into a functional MVP with:
- Supabase integration \(auth, PostgreSQL, storage, edge functions\)
- Real audio recording via MediaRecorder API with upload to Supabase Storage
- OpenAI Whisper transcription via edge function with timestamped segments
- TipTap rich text editor with auto-save, formatting toolbar, and .docx export
- GPT-4o AI assistant with real chat, plus rephrase/condense/to-prose edge functions
- Project management dashboard with CRUD
- Full-text transcript search \(Cmd+K\)
- Protected routes, auth flow, and user management

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Fix white screen: gracefully handle missing Supabase credentials

Show a setup instructions screen when .env.local has placeholder values
instead of crashing the app with an unhandled throw at module load time.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Add Supabase CLI config and PRD documents

- Add supabase/config.toml and .gitignore for CLI-based Edge Function deployments
- Include PRD documents \(docx + markdown\) for project reference
- Edge Functions deployed: transcribe, ai-chat, ai-rephrase, ai-condense, ai-to-prose
- Database schema executed in Supabase with all tables, RLS policies, and storage bucket

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Replace boilerplate README with comprehensive Biograph documentation

Covers tech stack, features, setup guide \(Supabase, env vars, Edge Functions\),
project structure, database schema, and Edge Function reference.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Pass Supabase env vars to build step via GitHub secrets

The production build needs VITE_SUPABASE_URL and VITE_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY
to connect to the Supabase backend.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Correction accents français + formulaire de contact sur landing page

- Ajout de tous les accents manquants \(é, è, ê, ç, à, ô, etc.\) sur toute la page
- Remplacement du mailto par un formulaire de contact \(Dialog avec FormSubmit.co\)
- Le formulaire envoie les messages directement à erik.schjoth@gmail.com

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
